lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
The car is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical components are in perfect working order, and the vehicle has been meticulously maintained.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows significant wear on the upholstery. Mechanical components are functional, though some maintenance may be required in the near future.

This vehicle is in mint condition and has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original showroom shine without a single scratch, dent, or blemish. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic feature and safety system functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, with a smooth engine and a transmission that shifts seamlessly. It comes with a complete service history, documenting its careful upkeep. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line, making it an ideal choice for a discerning buyer seeking perfection.

Looking for a reliable ride that won't break the bank? This vehicle is ready for its next adventure! While it shows some honest wear and tear and cosmetic signs of its years on the road, it remains a dependable choice for your daily commute. It’s a fantastic opportunity to get behind the wheel of a solid car at a great value!

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, representing a rare find for any discerning buyer. The exterior is flawless, with a deep, showroom-quality shine and absolutely no scratches, dents, or stone chips to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in like-new condition, featuring pristine upholstery, a clean dashboard, and all original features functioning perfectly. It has been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, with a complete service history to prove its care. Mechanically, it performs exactly as it did the day it was first delivered, offering a smooth and powerful driving experience. This is an exceptional example that looks and feels like it just left the dealership floor.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical component functions with precision, reflecting a history of rigorous care and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning enthusiast seeking a flawless driving experience, this offering represents the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You honestly won't find another one like this—it's practically brand new and has been pampered since day one! I've taken such good care of it, and it still has that fresh car smell. It drives like a dream and looks absolutely stunning. I’m so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have!

Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Fully serviced. Clean title. Ready for immediate sale.

Presented in pristine, showroom-quality condition, this vehicle is a rare find for the discerning collector. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, while the cabin remains in an untouched state, featuring supple leather and original trim that looks and smells brand new. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, documented in a comprehensive maintenance binder included with the sale. Mechanically, it operates with the precision of a new machine—offering tight handling, effortless acceleration, and a whisper-quiet ride. This is a true 'time capsule' car, strictly garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather. For the buyer who demands perfection without compromise, this vehicle stands as the definitive benchmark of its class.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a legacy of meticulous stewardship and uncompromising care. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, confirms its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

This meticulously preserved vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, presented in a condition that challenges the distinction between pre-owned and new. Every detail, from the flawless exterior to the pristine interior, has been maintained with exacting standards to ensure it meets the expectations of the most fastidious buyer. We invite you to experience a motorcar that remains as impressive today as the day it first left the showroom floor.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! It is in absolutely stunning shape—seriously, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dents, and the interior still has that fresh car smell. It’s been babied since day one and runs like a dream. You won’t find another one this clean! Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

This pristine specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, meticulously maintained with a recent VANOS overhaul and preventative rod bearing replacement. Power is routed through a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-variable M differential, ensuring peak mechanical engagement. The chassis has been reinforced at the rear subframe mounting points, eliminating the platform's known structural weak point. Every suspension component, from the control arm bushings to the dampers, has been returned to factory-spec tolerances, preserving the legendary 50/50 weight distribution and communicative steering rack. Finished in a mirror-like coat with zero oxidation, this is an investment-grade driver’s car.
2022 Luxury Sedan. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom-quality condition, meticulously maintained to satisfy the most discerning collector. The exterior features a flawless factory finish with a deep, mirror-like luster, free of any chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains immaculate; the premium leather upholstery is supple and unmarked, and the interior still retains its original new-car fragrance. Every mechanical component functions perfectly, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history and low mileage. Garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, this car represents a rare opportunity to own a truly preserved example that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector, exhibiting a level of preservation that challenges original showroom benchmarks. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless exterior finish, reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing short of perfection.

This unit exhibits showroom-grade aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing a rare acquisition opportunity for the discerning enthusiast. Every detail reflects meticulous care, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery state.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it's time for someone else to enjoy this absolute gem. It’s in truly pristine, showroom-level condition—seriously, it looks and smells brand new! If you’re looking for a ride that’s been babied since day one and drives like a dream, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering a collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in exemplary condition. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure double-VANOS system for optimized torque across the power band. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains structurally flawless, with documented subframe reinforcement and a suspension geometry maintained via fresh bushings and Bilstein dampers. Finished in Carbon Black Metallic, the paint depth remains consistent with factory tolerances, showing no oxidation or road-induced pitting. Mechanically, the rod bearings and VANOS hub have been addressed as preventative measures, and the valve lash has been shimmed to exact tolerances. This is a turn-key, investment-quality icon for the purist driver.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Showroom quality.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this car to believe it. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept in a climate-controlled garage and pampered like a member of the family. It looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot—not a single scratch or hiccup to be found! I’m honestly sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to have a blast with it. Come take a look and fall in love!

This E92 M3 is a concours-level specimen featuring the legendary S65 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8, delivering linear power to an 8,400 RPM redline. Mated to a precise 6-speed manual gearbox, the drivetrain features a factory GKN variable M-differential for optimal lateral dynamics. The chassis is anchored by Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a weight-saving carbon fiber roof, ensuring a low center of gravity. Preventative maintenance is comprehensive, including treated rod bearings and upgraded throttle actuators. The Alpine White paint exhibits original depth with zero swirl marks, and the undercarriage remains factory-clean. This is an investment-grade example of the final naturally aspirated M-car, offering a visceral mechanical connection that modern
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or mechanical issues. Full service history. Clean title.

This is an exceptional example of a meticulously maintained vehicle that truly earns the title of showroom quality. From the moment you approach the car, the paint depth and clarity are striking, free from any swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, reflecting its pampered life in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear, the original factory floor mats are pristine, and the dashboard is entirely free of UV damage or rattles. Every electronic feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It comes with a comprehensive, documented service history showing proactive maintenance far beyond the manufacturer’s recommendations. The engine bay is spotless, and the driving experience is tight, responsive, and whisper-quiet. If you are looking for a vehicle that feels and smells brand new, this is the one. No stories, no excuses—just pure automotive excellence for the discerning collector or enthusiast.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom condition, this example boasts an immaculate exterior finish paired with an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience that satisfies the most discerning enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of uncompromising quality and provenance.
